recovery_note: Durability is verified across a SIGKILL after a CHECKPOINT. Recovery of un-checkpointed writes produced under concurrency is a known heap WAL-replay gap, tracked in ROADMAP.md (P2 vector/storage).
policy: Sustained concurrent ANN reads + far-region writes, then a CHECKPOINT and a SIGKILL + restart. Pass requires error-free load, recall above the floor both during load and after recovery, and every committed row durable after the abrupt restart.
